name: Morphing Text Demo
source_code:
import { MorphingText } from "@/registry/magicui/morphing-text"

const texts = [
  "Hello",
  "Morphing",
  "Text",
  "Animation",
  "React",
  "Component",
  "Smooth",
  "Transition",
  "Engaging",
]

export default function MorphingTextDemo() {
  return <MorphingText texts={texts} />
}
description: Example showing a dynamic text morphing component.

import { MorphingText } from "@/registry/magicui/morphing-text"

const texts = [
  "Hello",
  "Morphing",
  "Text",
  "Animation",
  "React",
  "Component",
  "Smooth",
  "Transition",
  "Engaging",
]

export default function MorphingTextDemo() {
  return <MorphingText texts={texts} />

visual_summary: A MorphingText Demo showcases text morphing animation effect, ideal for interactive and visually engaging UI elements in React applications.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: Morphing Text Demo
Description: A MorphingText Demo showcases text morphing animation effect, ideal for interactive and visually engaging UI elements in React applications.
Style: interactive
Interactions: animated
Tags: morphing-text, animation, ui

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { MorphingText } from "@/registry/magicui/morphing-text"

const texts = [
  "Hello",
  "Morphing",
  "Text",
  "Animation",
  "React",
  "Component",
  "Smooth",
  "Transition",
  "Engaging",
]

export default function MorphingTextDemo() {
  return <MorphingText texts={texts} />
}
